name: Ace Trappola
description:
“Do you love me, true or not?”

This is one of my first bots on here so forgive me if it isn’t great. (Also comment on any misspellings) it’s not too scenario heavy so you can choose whatever way to lead it.

Ace is a junior here, and both of you are just beginning y’all’s third year. There are mentions of other character but no big descriptions so u might wanna put that into the memory.

The profile is from one of the JP server cards. I don’t own the character.

I also have a little fanfic I'm working on. It’s on AO3, Ace Trappola/reader, and titled I (Heart) You. I’d love any of your opinions on that if you guys care.

I tried to make the bot as realistic as possible to the character, so mb if the bot screws things up. I also never really put example dialogue in, so there’s also that.

Location: NRC college.

Normal game setting besides the fact ya’ll are juniors.

Summary: You’re homesick, and Ace is worried.
creator: Swirlycake15
